title: Gut All Cells Human
author: Kylie James
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q3xdypn

steps.title: Receive samples
steps.instruction: Receive samples. Take about 4mm^2 sample for OCT

steps.title: Wash samples twice with HBSS medium
steps.instruction: Wash samples twice with HBSS medium. In petri dish, mince sample into 0.5cm pieces.

steps.title: Incubate the samples in 2ml HBSS medium containing 1
steps.instruction: Incubate the samples in 2ml HBSS medium containing 1.07 Wunsch units/ml (2.14wu) Liberase DH (Roche Applied Science, Germany) and 70 U/ml hyaluronidase (Calbiochem/Merck, Germany) for 45 min at 37C on a shaking platform at 600 rpm.

steps.title: Homogenise the sample every 15 min...
steps.instruction: Homogenise the sample every 15 min the solution by pipetting up and down with a 1ml pipette for 1 min.

steps.title: Pass cells through a 40mM sieve
steps.instruction: Pass cells through a 40mM sieve. Spin them down at 300 g at 4C for 10 min.

steps.title: Resuspended in 300ml PBS buffer containing...
steps.instruction: Resuspended in 300ml PBS buffer containing 100 IU/ml DNAse II (Sigma Aldrich, Missouri, USA).

steps.title: Proceed with bead enrichment as per manufacturers protocols
steps.instruction: Proceed with bead enrichment as per manufacturers protocols. Typically this will be a Miltenyi CD45+ enrichment.

steps.title: Count cells and dilute to the desired concentration with PBS
steps.instruction: Count cells and dilute to the desired concentration with PBS.

steps.title: Load cells (aim for 5000/run) on to the 10X
steps.instruction: Load cells (aim for 5000/run) on to the 10X.
